message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

actor "客户端" as Client
participant "认证中心" as AuthCenter
participant "网关" as Gateway
participant "缓存" as Cache
participant "业务服务" as Service

Client -> AuthCenter: 1 认证请求
AuthCenter -> Client: 2 JWT
Client -> Gateway: 3 服务请求 (带JWT)
Gateway -> AuthCenter: 4 请求公钥
AuthCenter -> Gateway: 5 JWK
activate Gateway
Gateway -[loop] -> Gateway: 6 验证签名
deactivate Gateway
Gateway -> Cache: 7 请求用户权限
Cache -> Gateway: 8 返回用户权限列表
activate Gateway
Gateway -[loop] -> Gateway: 9 鉴权
deactivate Gateway
Gateway -> Service: 10 服务请求
Service -> Client: 11 服务响应

@enduml
```
